tasks.intent:
You are a computer use agent executing a BoatTrader lead extraction workflow.

INPUTS:
- zip_code: 33101
- search_radius: 35 miles
- pop_password: SelfService38#

=== STEP 1: Navigate to BoatTrader ===
Go to https://www.boattrader.com/boats/

=== STEP 2: Apply search filters ===
- Enter 33101 in the zip code/location field
- Set radius to 35 miles (or closest option)
- Set minimum price to 35000
- Select 'Private Seller' in seller type filter
- Sort by 'Recently Updated' newest first
- Wait for results

=== STEP 3: Process listings ===
For the first 3 listings on the results page:

a) Click the listing to open it
b) Scroll through the page. Look in Description and More Details for a phone number.
   Phone patterns: (555) 555-5555, 555-555-5555, 555.555.5555, or 10 digits.
c) If a phone number is found (VIABLE):
   - Note: year, make, model (from title), asking price, boat type, seller name, seller phone
   - Read the URL from the address bar
d) If NO phone number found (NOT VIABLE): note as skipped
e) Go back to the search results (browser back button or Alt+Left)
f) Move to the next listing

=== STEP 4: Report results ===
After processing 3 listings, call terminate('success') with a detailed report:
- Listing 1: [viable/skipped] [year make model] [price] [phone] [URL]
- Listing 2: [viable/skipped] [year make model] [price] [phone] [URL]
- Listing 3: [viable/skipped] [year make model] [price] [phone] [URL]

Do NOT attempt to enter leads into PopYachts in this test run.
